nodes.name: Schedule Trigger - 6:00 AM Daily
nodes.notes: Triggers every day at 6:00 AM to send provider schedules

nodes.name: Fetch Today's Bookings from Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Retrieves all bookings for today from Google Sheets

nodes.name: Group Bookings by Provider
nodes.notes: Organizes today's bookings by provider and calculates summaries

nodes.name: Load Morning Report Template
nodes.notes: Loads and populates morning report email template for each provider

nodes.name: Send Morning Report to Each Provider
nodes.notes: Emails daily schedule to each provider

nodes.name: Log Report Sent to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Logs that morning report was sent

parameters.subject: 📊 Morning Summary - {{$json.date}} - {{$json.totalBookings}} Tours Today
parameters.html:
Daily Morning Summary

Date: {{$json.date}}

Total Providers: {{$json.totalProviders}}

Total Bookings: {{$json.totalBookings}}

Total Customers: {{$json.totalCustomers}}

Provider Breakdown:

    {{#each providers}}
  • {{this.name}}: {{this.bookings}} bookings, {{this.customers}} customers
    • {{/each}}

Report generated: {{$json.reportGeneratedTime}}
